subject: refactor: extract shared utilities and deduplicate code across codebase
body:
Implements code review findings (non-Phase-4 items):
- Extract getCellInfo, getCellPositionLabel, countCells, cleanupOrphanedCells
  to src/utils/cellUtils.js (eliminates 3x duplication across components)
- Extract toRgba/toTransparentRgba helpers in layouts.js (replaces 28 inline
  RGBA conversions) and pre-group overlay types by category
- Extract ThemeColorPicker component from StyleTab (replaces 3 copy-pasted UIs)
- Deduplicate desktop/mobile header buttons in App.jsx using responsive classes
- Add reference equality check in useHistory before expensive JSON.stringify
- Remove dead imageAspectRatio state variable from App.jsx

Net: -626 lines removed, +117 added across 7 modified + 2 new files.

Tags: refactor, utilities, deduplication, performance
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-refactor
Semver: patch
